items.text: Just found the best quiet spot on campus! Basement level of Hayden Library, study room B12. Open until midnight, and the vending coffee is only $1.50! Bring headphones, the wifi is super fast. Reserve online before 4:00 PM!

questions.stem: According to the post, what does the writer recommend bringing?
questions.explanation: The post directly states 'Bring headphones,' which paraphrases to a pair of headphones.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about study room B12?

options.A: It tends to fill up quickly

questions.explanation: Because the writer urges readers to reserve online before 4:00 PM, this implies the room fills up quickly.

items.text: Hi Marcus, A package arrived for you at the Sterling Hall mailroom on May 20. Please stop by Room 110 before Friday at 5:00 PM to pick it up. Bring your student ID. Thanks, RA Jenna

questions.stem: According to the email, what should Marcus bring?
questions.explanation: The email directly instructs Marcus to bring his student ID.

questions.stem: What can be inferred if Marcus does not arrive before Friday at 5:00 PM?

options.A: He will pay a late fee
options.B: He may lose access to the package
options.C: He will need a new ID

questions.explanation: The strict pickup window implies that missing it may result in losing access to the package.

items.text: Dear Priya, This confirms your campus tour guide shift on Saturday, June 6, from 10:00 AM to 12:30 PM. Please meet at the Visitor Center desk by 9:45 AM. Wear the navy guide polo. Best, Coordinator Liu

questions.stem: According to the email, where should Priya report?
questions.explanation: The email instructs Priya to meet at the Visitor Center desk.

questions.stem: According to the email, what should Priya wear?
questions.explanation: The email directly states Priya should wear the navy guide polo.

items.text: NOTICE: Fire alarm testing will be conducted in Whitman Hall on Tuesday, June 9, from 8:00 AM to 10:00 AM. Residents are advised to remain indoors. Tampering with alarms results in a $75 fine. Questions may be directed to Facilities at extension 4402.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what should residents do during testing?
questions.explanation: The notice advises residents to remain indoors, paraphrased as stay inside their rooms.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the $75 fine?

options.A: It applies only to repeat offenders

questions.explanation: Listing a fine for tampering implies the policy exists to discourage interference with the devices.
